text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City talks with Tamamo Cross before the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once again, Tamamo Cross asks why Gold City
runs. This time, Gold City admits she has no real
answer other than the simple desire to run and
win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And for Gold City, that's good enough. She heads
off to the race in high spirits!
